selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: a declining four-week average of initial unemployment claims indicates easing labor-market stress and favors QQQ's longer-duration growth exposure, while an equal or rising level favors broader SPY exposure
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: this is a high-frequency labor-stress allocation using U.S. Employment and Training Administration IC4WSA real-time history; it is distinct from the closed monthly unemployment-rate level, survey sentiment, retail sales, production, inflation, money, rate, volatility, credit, housing, commodity, currency, seasonality and price mechanisms

signal.source: U.S. Employment and Training Administration 4-Week Moving Average of Initial Claims, series IC4WSA, distributed through FRED/ALFRED real-time-period history
signal.formula: at each decision cutoff, choose the latest available revision for the newest available IC4WSA weekly observation and for the exact weekly observation 28 calendar days earlier; delta_t=current_claimants-prior_28_day_claimants
signal.target_rule: negative delta_t means QQQ weight 1.0; equal or positive delta_t means SPY weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: ALFRED realtime_start_date becomes conservatively available only at 23:59:59.999999 America/New_York; values later than the frozen cutoff are excluded
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no interpolation, carry-forward, raw ICSA substitution, alternate lag, level threshold, persistence, additional smoothing, moving average, price filter, volatility filter, grid or source blending
signal.ancestry_limitation: IC4WSA is itself a revisable four-week moving average of administrative claims and is not a complete labor-market or earnings measure; this limitation is frozen and no prior outcome may change the rule

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York after the final accepted XNYS close preceding the next monthly execution session
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical monthly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 20 intervals, four of each state, and two transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.00000000298023223876953125 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(512000000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
